creator: thomas.dreibholz@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 248410
The shar file

The package rserpooldemo has been missing in the FreeBSD ports. Therefore, I have created a port.

This package contains the RSerPool Demo Tool for RSPLIB. See https://www.nntb.no/~dreibh/rserpool/ for details on Reliable Server Pooling (RSerPool) and the RSerPoolDemo tool! 

Homepage of rserpooldemo: https://www.nntb.no/~dreibh/rserpool/

Fix: The shar file rserpooldemo-3.1.4.shar is attached.
